description: M2.9.0 cross-language fixture for dispatch policy gate decisions (F2). Each case has a 'scope' field: 'cross' means both the Python FabricPolicyEngine and the Rust PolicyEngine are expected to agree; 'rust_only' means the case exercises a predicate only implemented in the Rust engine (blocked_branches, allowed_branches, cwd scope-escape, blocked_scope_globs, require_approval_for_scopes). The Python test runs only 'cross' cases; the Rust test runs all. 'expected_decision' is one of 'allow', 'deny', 'needs_approval'. 'expected_reason_contains' is a substring that must appear in the decision reasons (empty string = no constraint).

cases.name: deny_scope_forbidden_path
cases.description: A scope_glob that overlaps a forbidden path is denied.

cases.name: deny_scope_overlaps_github_workflows
cases.description: Real-world guard: scope exactly matching .github/workflows/** is denied.

cases.name: needs_approval_protected_branch
cases.description: A branch matching protected_branches requires approval.

cases.name: needs_approval_protected_branch_glob
cases.description: A branch matching a glob in protected_branches requires approval.

cases.name: allow_agent_no_branch
cases.description: Agent brief with null branch skips all branch checks.

cases.name: allow_scope_not_overlapping_forbidden
cases.description: A scope that does not overlap any forbidden path is allowed.

cases.name: deny_blocked_branch
cases.description: A branch in blocked_branches is hard-denied (no approval path). Rust only: Python engine has no blocked_branches field.

cases.name: deny_branch_not_in_allowlist
cases.description: allowed_branches is set; a branch not in the list is denied. Rust only.

cases.name: allow_branch_in_allowlist
cases.description: Branch exactly in allowed_branches → allow. Rust only.

cases.name: deny_scope_blocked_glob
cases.description: A scope_glob blocked by blocked_scope_globs is denied. Rust only.

cases.name: needs_approval_scope_approval_required
cases.description: A scope matching require_approval_for_scopes needs approval. Rust only.

cases.name: deny_command_cwd_forbidden_path
cases.description: command-kind: cwd matching a forbidden path prefix is denied. Rust only.

cases.name: deny_command_cwd_scope_escape
cases.description: command-kind: cwd outside the scope prefixes is denied (scope-escape). Rust only.

cases.name: allow_command_cwd_within_scope
cases.description: command-kind: cwd within the scope prefix is allowed. Rust only.

cases.name: allow_command_empty_cwd
cases.description: command-kind: empty cwd skips containment check. Rust only.

cases.name: allow_command_null_cwd
cases.description: command-kind: null cwd skips containment check. Rust only.
